title: Temporary Constitutional Organ Quorum Begins Operations

bottlenecks.summary: Congress and appointing authorities failed to constitute the Constitutional Organs on the timeline required by the Constitution by day 365 under Article XIX Section 5.2.
Congress and appointing authorities failed to complete the constitutional-organ appointment process after Supreme Court order by day 420 under Article XIX Section 5.2A.

satisfied_duties.duty: provide by law for the first federal elections and orderly commencement of terms under the new constitutional order
satisfied_duties.outcome: provided by law for the first federal elections and orderly commencement of terms under the new constitutional order

satisfied_duties.duty: order completion of the constitutional-organ appointment process
satisfied_duties.outcome: ordered completion of the constitutional-organ appointment process within 30 days

satisfied_duties.duty: begin lawful startup, continuity, and protective functions under the temporary quorum created by the Supreme Court
satisfied_duties.outcome: began lawful startup, continuity, and protective functions under the temporary quorum while the ordinary appointment process remained incomplete
satisfied_duties.source: Article XIX Section 5.2A; Article XII Section 2.7, Section 3.7, and Section 5.6

failed_duties.duty: constitute the Constitutional Organs on the timeline required by the Constitution
failed_duties.outcome: Congress and appointing authorities failed to constitute the Constitutional Organs on the timeline required by the Constitution by day 365 under Article XIX Section 5.2.

failed_duties.duty: complete the constitutional-organ appointment process after Supreme Court order
failed_duties.outcome: Congress and appointing authorities failed to complete the constitutional-organ appointment process after Supreme Court order by day 420 under Article XIX Section 5.2A.

ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Congress and appointing authorities failed to constitute the Constitutional Organs on the timeline required by the Constitution by day 365 under Article XIX Section 5.2.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
